name: AuthorityHook
description: Content creator establishes expertise or credentials

name: ControversyHook
description: Provocative or contrarian opening statement
pattern: (?i)(hot take|unpopular opinion|nobody talks about|controversial|they don't want you to know|truth is|shocking)

name: TransformationBeforeAfter
description: Shows dramatic change or transformation

name: WalkingWisdom
description: Creator walking while sharing insights

name: GreenScreen
description: Uses green screen or chroma key background

name: QuestionHook
description: Opens with engaging question
pattern: (?i)^.{0,50}(what if|have you ever|did you know|why do|how many|what would)

name: NumbersHook
description: Uses specific numbers or statistics

name: UrgencyHook
description: Creates sense of urgency or scarcity

name: PersonalStory
description: Shares personal anecdote or experience
pattern: (?i)(when I|my story|happened to me|I remember|personal experience|I used to)

name: CallToAction
description: Clear instruction for viewer action
pattern: (?i)(follow me|like this|subscribe|comment below|share this|try this|do this)

name: EmotionalTrigger
description: Uses emotional language to engage

name: TrendingTopic
description: References current events or trends

name: DualPersonality
description: Shows contrasting personas or moods

name: TextOverlay
description: Heavy use of text overlays on video

name: MusicSync
description: Visual cuts synchronized with music beats

name: CloseUpFace
description: Predominantly close-up facial shots

name: HandGestures
description: Prominent use of hand movements

name: ProductShowcase
description: Features or demonstrates a product

name: LifeHack
description: Shares practical tips or shortcuts

name: Storytelling
description: Narrative structure with beginning, middle, end

name: MultipleTakes
description: Multiple quick cuts or takes within video

name: BrandMention
description: Mentions well-known brands or companies

name: LocationTag
description: References specific locations or places

name: AgeTarget
description: Content clearly targeting specific age group

name: EducationalContent

name: Comedy
description: Humorous content or jokes

name: Challenge
description: Participates in or creates challenges

name: Reaction
description: Reacting to other content

name: POVContent

pattern: (?i)(pov|point of view|imagine if|you are|from your perspective)

name: MaximalEffects
